name: Jesus Burgess (Reprint)
effect_text: This Character cannot be K.O.'d by your opponent's effects.If your Leader has the "Blackbeard Pirates" type, this Character gains +1000 power for every 4 cards in your trash.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
